0.text: Traction bronchiectasis in the lung parenchyma

1.text: Honeycomb lung in the lung parenchyma, more prominent towards the base

2.text: Area of consolidation in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Progressive increase in size of the area of consolidation in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung, measuring approximately 46 mm
